name: Hornsdale Power Reserve
notable: The battery that started it all. Born from Elon Musk's famous Twitter bet. Has earned tens of millions in FCAS revenue.

timeline.title: Project announced after Elon Musk Twitter bet
timeline.detail: Tesla CEO bet the system would be built within 100 days or it would be free. Original capacity 100MW/129MWh.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

timeline.title: Phase 1 operational — 100 MW / 129 MWh
timeline.detail: Completed within the 100-day deadline. At the time, the largest lithium-ion battery in the world.

timeline.title: World's largest lithium-ion battery connected to grid
timeline.detail: Completed within Elon Musk's 100 days or it's free bet. 100MW/129MWh connected to SA grid.

timeline.title: First major grid response — Loy Yang A trip
timeline.detail: HPR injected 7.3MW within milliseconds when Loy Yang A unit 3 tripped (560MW loss), responding faster than any conventional generator.

timeline.title: Captures 55% of SA FCAS market, cuts prices 91%
timeline.detail: After six months HPR provided 55% of SA frequency control services and reduced FCAS costs from $470/MWh to $40/MWh.

timeline.title: Phase 2 expansion to 150MW/194MWh completed
timeline.detail: A$82M expansion added 50MW/64.5MWh, enabling advanced grid services including synthetic inertia trials.

timeline.title: World-first: AEMO approves battery inertia services
timeline.detail: AEMO approved HPR to deliver 2,000 MWs equivalent inertia via Virtual Machine Mode — roughly 15% of SA's predicted inertia shortfall.
